caption: The video features an individual standing at a podium, delivering a speech. The person is dressed in traditional attire, consisting of a white kurta and vest, and has a white beard. They are gesturing with their hands as they speak, indicating an engaging and expressive delivery. The background consists of a textured wall with a geometric pattern, and there is a decorative column to the right of the speaker, adorned with red flowers at its base. The setting appears formal, possibly a government or official event, given the presence of microphones and the dignified atmosphere.
